particulars.description: All estates or interests in any property now owned by the company including the freehold property 1-3 aberbraint, fford brynsiencyn, llanfairpwllgwyngyll title number CYM759447 and the freehold property aberbraint lodge, fford brynsiencyn, llanfairpwllgwyngyll title number CYM780189 and all estates or interests in any property now or subsequently owned by the company and all equitable interests in any property now or subsequently owned by company which now or may in the future belong to the company (including, for the avoidance of doubt, the right to receive a transfer, or to direct the transfer, of any shares or membership rights which the company holds in any company or association connected with the above properties).

All estates or interests in the freehold property 1-3 aberbraint, fford brynsiencyn, llanfairpwllgwyngyll title number CYM759447 and the freehold property aberbraint lodge, fford brynsiencyn, llanfairpwllgwyngyll title number CYM780189 (‘the property’) and all estates or interests in the property and all equitable interests in the property which now or may in the future belong to the company (including for the avoidance of doubt the right to receive a transfer, or to direct the transfer, of any shares or membership rights which the company holds in any company or association connected with the property) and the goodwill and any intellectual property relating to any business carried on by the company at the property.

The freehold land known as 1-3 aberbraint, ffordd brynsiencyn, llanfairpwllgwyngyll (LL61 6PB), title number CYM759447; and the freehold land known as aberbraint lodge, ffordd brynsiencyn, llanfairpwllgwyngyll and land on the north side of aberbraint lodge LL61 6PB, title number CYM780189.
